title: Generate SAS program to create SDTM SUPPDS (Supplemental DS) domain

inputs.prompt: Write a SAS program to create the SDTM SUPPDS (Supplemental DS) domain dataset. The program must: (1) Read raw supplemental ds data, (2) Derive USUBJID and SUPPDSSEQ (sequential numbering per subject), (3) Map key variables: RDOMAIN, USUBJID, IDVAR, IDVARVAL, QNAM, QVAL, QLABEL, (4) Handle supplemental qualifier derivation for disposition variables, (5) Apply variable attributes per SDTM specification, (6) Create a permanent SAS dataset with xport format. The dataset contains approximately 466 records.
